name: DMD Exon 45-50 Deletion (Classic Duchenne)
description: Deletion of exons 45-50 in DMD gene. Out-of-frame deletion causing Duchenne phenotype.

expected.notes: Exon 51 skipping restores reading frame. Eteplirsen and Viltolarsen are FDA-approved for this skip.

name: DMD Exon 49-50 Deletion
description: Deletion of exons 49-50 in DMD gene. Out-of-frame, amenable to exon 51 skipping.

expected.notes: One of the most common DMD mutations amenable to exon 51 skipping.

name: DMD Exon 44 Deletion
description: Single exon 44 deletion. Amenable to exon 45 skipping.

expected.notes: Exon 45 skipping with Casimersen is FDA-approved.

name: DMD Exon 52 Deletion
description: Single exon 52 deletion. Amenable to exon 53 skipping.

expected.notes: Exon 53 skipping with Golodirsen is FDA-approved.

name: DMD Exon 3-7 Deletion (Becker-like)
description: Deletion of exons 3-7 in DMD gene. In-frame deletion producing Becker phenotype.

expected.notes: Already in-frame deletion — produces shortened but partially functional dystrophin (Becker phenotype). No exon skipping needed.
